project_info.name: PM Kusum Document Portal
project_info.archetype: Fintech Trust (Archetype 4) merged with Organic & Earthy (Archetype 1) for agriculture. Razorpay/Groww inspired.
project_info.core_vibe: Trustworthy, Premium, Frictionless, Apple-like polish, Highly Accessible

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#0F172A] leading-tight
scale.label: text-xs font-semibold tracking-wider uppercase text-[#94A3B8]

typography.anti_ai_rules: Do not use Inter for headings. Use Poppins to give a friendly, premium, and trustworthy feel. Never use text larger than 5xl on mobile.

layout_and_spacing.mobile_first_rules: Stack all grids to 1 column on mobile. Use max-h-[60vh] for hero images on mobile. Ensure CTA is sticky or always within thumb reach.

buttons.primary: bg-[#16A34A] hover:bg-[#15803d] text-white font-medium px-8 py-4 rounded-full transition-all duration-200 active:scale-95 flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: bg-[#E0F2FE] hover:bg-[#bae6fd] text-[#2563EB] font-medium px-8 py-4 rounded-full transition-all duration-200 active:scale-95

cards.base: bg-white border border-[#E2E8F0] rounded-3xl shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] p-6 sm:p-8 transition-transform duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1

inputs.text: w-full bg-[#F8FAFC] border border-[#E2E8F0] rounded-xl px-4 py-3.5 text-[#0F172A] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2563EB]/20 focus:border-[#2563EB] transition-all

icons.style: stroke-[1.5] text-[#2563EB] or text-[#16A34A] depending on context. Avoid heavy solid icons.

motion_and_interaction.page_load: Fade up with y: 20, opacity: 0 to 1, duration: 0.5s, ease: 'easeOut'
motion_and_interaction.stagger_lists: staggerChildren: 0.1 for timeline and features list
motion_and_interaction.micro_interactions: Buttons shrink slightly on tap (scale: 0.97). Cards lift on hover (y: -4px).
motion_and_interaction.success_animation: Use a subtle scale-in pop with a green checkmark on the Success Page.

hero.layout: 2-column on desktop, stacked on mobile. Text on left/top, Image on right/bottom.
hero.content: Value-driven headline addressing the pain point. Primary CTA 'Get Your PM Kusum Kit - ₹299'. Subtext 'Instant PDF Download'.
hero.visuals: Farmer with solar panels illustration/photo. Trust badges (Secure Payment, Instant Access) under CTA.

benefits.content: 4 cards highlighting time-saving, accuracy, easy-to-understand language, and official format adherence.

whats_included.content: 8 features (e.g., Application Form Draft, Checklist, Eligibility Guide). Green checkmarks for each item.

how_it_works.layout: Vertical timeline on mobile, horizontal steps on desktop.
how_it_works.content: 4 steps: 1. Fill details 2. Pay ₹299 securely 3. Instant Download 4. Apply locally.

lead_form.content: Simple Shadcn form: Name, Phone Number. 'Continue to Payment' button.

payment_section.content: Price anchor (₹299). Lock icon. '100% Secure Transaction'. Simulated seamless payment flow.

faq.content: Address top objections: Is it a government site? (No), Refund policy? Delivery time?

testimonials.layout: Horizontal scroll or grid of soft cards.

success_and_download.content: Celebration animation. Big prominent 'Download PDF Kit' button. Secured file representation.

hero_farmer_solar.alt: Farmer with solar panels on green field
hero_farmer_solar.usage: Main hero section image, rounded corners, soft shadow

documents_preview.alt: Pile of printing papers representing the document kit

solar_farm_bg.usage: Optional background for testimonials or call to action section, use with heavy white/light overlay

testing.attributes: Every interactive element MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="hero-cta-button"`, `data-testid="lead-form-phone-input"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use HTML <form> or <input> elements directly for complex forms; use Shadcn UI Form and Input components, heavily customized to match the spacing and border radius defined here.
The target audience is farmers on mobile devices coming from IG Reels. Keep the UI incredibly clean, fonts legible, and primary CTA massive and sticky if possible.
Implement the Poppins font for headings and Inter for body text.
In the Hero section, clearly state this is a Document Kit for ₹299 and NOT a government portal.
Make the cards feel like Razorpay/Groww widgets—clean white backgrounds, 1px subtle borders, and soft spread shadows.
For icons, use lucide-react with stroke-width 1.5. Use primary Green for success/checkmarks and Blue for information.
Ensure the entire flow from Hero -> Lead Form -> Payment -> Success -> Download is built as responsive sections or pages.
Apply Framer Motion for simple fade-up animations on scroll to make the page feel premium.
